properties.name: Crusher: Princely Deterrence
properties.description: When the wielder performs a Final Strike on the enemy, the wielder gains ATK +{atk_up:0.0%} for {duration:0}s. If the wielder is also the controlled operator, double the ATK increase gained and buff the Final Strike so that it deals Stagger +{poise_up:0.0%} to the enemy. Effects of the same name cannot stack.
